title: Fruiterra S3 - Towns and Mons
description: Season 3 of the Fruiterra SMP. This season highlights Cobblemon, Dungeons and Taverns, Minecolonies, and more!
body:
## 📝 Peach's Note

Fruiterra returns for its third season! This season focusses mainly on Cobblemon, Minecolonies, and Dungeons and Taverns! Explore the world, catch yourself some 'Mons, and build thriving towns.

*Designed with love for fwendos :3*

## ⭐ Mod Highlights

- Cobblemon
- Minecolonies
- Mekanism
-  Immersive Engineering
- Sophisticated Storage & Backpacks
- Tom's Simple Storage
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Farmer's Delight
- Chipped 
- Waystones
- Nullscape
- Incendium
- Deeper and Darker
- Proximity Chat

## 🐱‍🚀 Peach's Challenges

- Catch 'em all!
- Build your own towns inspired by the Pokémon universe, and even connect up with your friends!
- Visit and conquer all the reworked structures from Dungeons and Taverns!
- Go nuclear with Mekanism!
- Refine your favourite biome from William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld to make it into the dream landscape.
- Explore and master the updated dimensions from Incendium and Nullscape, as well as the new dimension from Deeper and Darker!
- Farm. Food. Fantabulous. Which one? All of them!

## 😨 Issues?

If you come across any major issues, please join [the discord server](https://discord.com/invite/FjfsnMy) and let me know!
